memoryArtifacts.headline: Le Blount Family, in Letitia S. La Roche, North Carolina Society of Colonial Dames of America, Application for Membership, 20 April 1900, Page 7
memoryArtifacts.description:
In 1900, Letitia S. LaRoche (nee Letitia Gamble Shepard) applied for membership in the North Carolina Society of Colonial Dames of America.

This is an excerpt from an 8 page "Application for Membership of Mrs. Letitia S. La Roche, Dated April 20, 1900, Elected June 6, 1900."

It is probably not all accurate.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Blount於1233年出生在英國素福爾可貝爾頓時，他的父親Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham37歲，母親Isabel Odingsells31歲。他於從1277年到1305年與ISABEL DE BEAUCHAMP結婚。他去世於1280年6月在英國武斯特斯爾享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾金萊特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Blount于1233年出生在英国素福爾可貝爾頓时，他的父亲Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham37岁，母亲Isabel Odingsells31岁。他于从1277年到1305年与ISABEL DE BEAUCHAMP结婚。他去世于1280年6月在英国武斯特斯爾享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾金萊特。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Blount was born in 1233, in Belton, Suffolk, England, his father, Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham, was 37 and his mother, Isabel Odingsells, was 31. He married ISABEL DE BEAUCHAMP from 1277 to 1305. He died in June 1280, in Worcestershire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Blount est né en 1233, à Belton, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Isabel Odingsells, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé ISABEL DE BEAUCHAMP du 1277 au 1305. Il est décédé en juin 1280, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Kinlet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Blount 1233 in Belton, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham 37 und seine Mutter Isabel Odingsells 31. Er hat von 1277 bis 1305 ISABEL DE BEAUCHAMP geheiratet. Er starb im Juni 1280 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Worcestershire, England und wurde in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Blount è nato il nel 1233 nel Belton, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Odingsells, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato ISABEL DE BEAUCHAMP da 1277 a 1305. Morì nel giugno 1280, nel Worcestershire, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Kinlet, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Blountが1233年にイギリススフォルクベルトンで生まれた時，父Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlinghamは37歳，母Isabel Odingsellsは31歳であった。から1277年まで1305年にISABEL DE BEAUCHAMPと結婚した。彼は1280年6月にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアキンレットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Blount(이)가 1233년 영국 수폴크 벨턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Odingsells(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1277년 부터 1305년 까지 ISABEL DE BEAUCHAMP(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1280년 6월 영국 워스스터실르에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 킨렛에 묻혔다.

mn.Kinlet, Shropshire, England: Kinlet, Salopesberia, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Blount nasceu em 1233, em Belton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Odingsells, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com ISABEL DE BEAUCHAMP de 1277 a 1305. Ele faleceu em junho de 1280, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Blount родился в 1233 г. в местности белтон, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Odingsells, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени ISABEL DE BEAUCHAMP с 1277 по 1305. Он умер июнь 1280 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности кинлет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Blount nació en 1233, en Belton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Isabel Odingsells, tenía 31 años. Se casó con ISABEL DE BEAUCHAMP desde 1277 hasta 1305. Murió en junio de 1280, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Kinlet, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
